items.title: Today’s my last day at CBS Sports. They’re not renewing my contract. Sorry, LeBron—there’s another James hitting free agency.
items.author: james herbert
items.body_excerpt:
Today’s my last day at CBS Sports. They’re not renewing my contract. Sorry, LeBron—there’s another James hitting free agency.

Eternally thankful for 12+ years, and for the chance to write about everybody from Dirk and Giannis to Alvarado and Konchar.

Not sure what’s next just yet. Email’s in bio.

items.title: Since this recommends giving flowers while the recipient can smell them:
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt:
Since this recommends giving flowers while the recipient can smell them:

When I think about writing with voice -- how you communicate to the world not just what you think, but what you are, who you are, how you are -- I think of Spencer. He writes in a way that makes me grateful I know how to read.

items.title: VJ Edgecombe was having a spa day in the Bahamas when he accidentally missed Jameer Nelson’s calls trying to give him a heads-up about the Jaylen Brown trade. He also had a momentary freak-out.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
VJ Edgecombe was having a spa day in the Bahamas when he accidentally missed Jameer Nelson’s calls trying to give him a heads-up about the Jaylen Brown trade. He also had a momentary freak-out. 

"I was like, 'Man, it's free agency, why [are] you calling me so much?' I thought I was gone."

More👇🏻

items.title: ICYMI: I spoke with the Sparks’ Alissa Pili, and the forward opened up about the last year that was, including dealing with several setbacks and her journey to getting back on the floor. “When you actually go through it, you find out how much you really want it,” Pili said.

items.title: [OC] What fast food chain is each NBA franchise?
items.author: StrategyTop7612
items.body_excerpt: This was much harder than it should have been and took a lot of thought. I'm open to thoughts. Atlanta Hawks: Zaxby’s Very popular in Georgia, occasionally excellent, but nobody outside the region is ever seriously thinking about them. Boston Celtics: Dunkin’ Inseparable from…
